_comment: Snippets for the JS/TS script editors. Schema: data/snippets/README.md. Bodies are inserted verbatim at the cursor. ``contexts`` filters which editor (pre/post) shows the category.

categories._comment: Send sub-requests via the inline pm.sendRequest IPC. Useful from both pre-request and tests.
categories.name: Send requests

snippets.name: Send an HTTP request

categories._comment: Variable getters/setters/unsetters. Visible in every script editor.
categories.name: Variables

categories._comment: Pre-request setup: auth headers, dynamic IDs, timestamps. Hidden from the post-response editor.
categories.name: Request setup

snippets.name: Set basic auth header
Login flow: fetch token, save to env

categories._comment: Post-response assertions — Postman-style chai chains. Hidden from the pre-request editor.
categories.name: Tests

snippets.name: Response body: JSON value check
Response body: is equal to a string
Response time is less than 200ms
Status code: code name has string
Validate JSON schema with tv4
Array length check

categories._comment: pm.require for npm / JSR packages. Detection scans for string literals; pin exact versions and configure private scopes at Settings → Private packages → npm/JSR. See docs/scripting/external-packages.md.
categories.name: Import npm / JSR packages

snippets.name: Import a public npm package
Import a public JSR package
Import from a private @scope (npm)
Import JSR via private npm-proxy
Decode a JWT response with jose
Validate response with zod
